children.heading: Administrator
children.label: a Administrator
children.text: Nothing in this part shall be construed to supersede the civilian emergency management authority of the Administrator under the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act ( et seq.) or the Post Katrina Emergency Management Reform Act ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 512116 U.S.C. 701See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: b Secretary
children.text: Nothing in this part shall be construed as providing new authority to the Secretary, except to coordinate and facilitate the development of the assessments and reports required pursuant to this part.
